runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "JavaScript", "build_system": "npm", "package_manager": "npm", "build_commands": ["npm install", "npm run build"], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "unknown", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "node:slim", "base_image_rationale": "Official Node.js slim image to install dependencies and build the browser library with minimal footprint.", "pitfalls": ["build script uses babel --watch, which blocks in a container; may need to run a non-watching build for CI.", "webpack.config.js has a bug in the storeNodes method (uses /\\*.js/ instead of /\\\\.js$/) that could affect builds.", "package.json lacks an engines field; Node version is not specified, so the exact runtime version is not guaranteed by this config.", "Output paths in webpack/Babel flow may not align with dist/index.js expected by package.json main field."], "notes": "This blueprint targets building the Choreographer library for browser use. The Dockerfile should install dependencies, run the build to produce dist artifacts (e.g., choreographer.min.js), and package for distribution. The demo/start scripts assume a GUI/browser environment and may need adaptation for headless CI."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Multi-stage build to compile the project from source and serve as a static site

# Stage 1: Build
FROM node:slim as builder

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies (copy package.json first for layer caching)
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install

# Ensure Babel CLI is available for non-watch builds
RUN npm install --save-dev babel-cli

# Copy the rest of the project
COPY . .

# Build from source: transpile and bundle
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/babel src --out-dir dist
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/webpack

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM node:slim

WORKDIR /app

# Copy build artifacts and static assets from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist
COPY --from=builder /app/index.html /app/index.html
COPY --from=builder /app/index.css /app/index.css
COPY --from=builder /app/assets /app/assets
COPY --from=builder /app/examples /app/examples

# Expose a lightweight static server (http-server)
RUN npm install -g http-server

EXPOSE 8080

# Command to serve this directory statically on port 8080
CMD ["http-server", ".", "-p", "8080"]

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build to compile the project from source and serve as a static site

# Stage 1: Build
FROM node:slim as builder

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies (copy package.json first for layer caching)
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install

# Ensure Babel CLI is available for non-watch builds
RUN npm install --save-dev babel-cli

# Copy the rest of the project
COPY . .

# Build from source: transpile and bundle
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/babel src --out-dir dist
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/webpack

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM node:slim

WORKDIR /app

# Copy build artifacts and static assets from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist
COPY --from=builder /app/index.html /app/index.html
COPY --from=builder /app/index.css /app/index.css
COPY --from=builder /app/assets /app/assets
COPY --from=builder /app/examples /app/examples

# Expose a lightweight static server (http-server)
RUN npm install -g http-server

EXPOSE 8080

# Command to serve this directory statically on port 8080
CMD ["http-server", ".", "-p", "8080"]
"}

# Multi-stage build to compile the project from source and serve as a static site

# Stage 1: Build
FROM node:slim as builder

WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies (copy package.json first for layer caching)
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install

# Ensure Babel CLI is available for non-watch builds
RUN npm install --save-dev babel-cli

# Copy the rest of the project
COPY . .

# Build from source: transpile and bundle
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/babel src --out-dir dist
RUN ./node_modules/.bin/webpack

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM node:slim

WORKDIR /app

# Copy build artifacts and static assets from the builder
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist
COPY --from=builder /app/index.html /app/index.html
COPY --from=builder /app/index.css /app/index.css
COPY --from=builder /app/assets /app/assets
COPY --from=builder /app/examples /app/examples

# Expose a lightweight static server (http-server)
RUN npm install -g http-server

EXPOSE 8080

# Command to serve this directory statically on port 8080
CMD ["http-server", ".", "-p", "8080"]
